privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a custom Wazuh rule to detect directory enumeration. The expected configuration values are explicitly defined in the task description and verifier scripts: rule ID 100500, parent SID 31101, frequency 15, timeframe 60, and Nginx log file path /var/log/nginx/access.log. All metadata claims exactly match the verification logic in export_result.sh.
